about.title: About AI Coloring Page Generator
about.subtitle: Learn about our mission and how we help people create beautiful coloring pages
about.missionText: We believe in the power of creativity and the benefits of coloring for people of all ages. Our mission is to make it easy for anyone to create high-quality, customized coloring pages using the latest AI technology.
about.technologyText: We use advanced AI image generation models specifically fine-tuned for creating coloring pages. Our technology understands natural language descriptions and converts them into beautiful black and white outlines perfect for coloring.
